LanguageData.Wula_Dark_Matter_Beam.label: Dark Matter Beam
LanguageData.Wula_Dark_Matter_Beam.deathMessage: {0} was penetrated and killed by a dark matter beam.
LanguageData.Wula_Dark_Matter_Flame.label: Dark Matter Annihilation
LanguageData.Wula_Dark_Matter_Flame.deathMessage: {0} was vaporized by the high-energy jet from dark matter annihilation.
LanguageData.Wula_Psi_Damage.label: Psychic Burn
LanguageData.Wula_Psi_Damage.deathMessage: {0} was burned to death by psychic energy.
LanguageData.Wula_Psi_Bomb.label: Psychic Deflagration
LanguageData.Wula_Psi_Bomb.deathMessage: {0} was burned to death by psychic energy.
LanguageData.Damage_WULA_Plasma.label: Plasma Melting
LanguageData.Damage_WULA_Plasma.deathMessage: {0} was killed by the molten explosion caused by plasma.
LanguageData.Damage_WULA_Plasma_Explosive.label: Molten Explosion
LanguageData.Damage_WULA_Plasma_Explosive.deathMessag: {0} was killed by the molten explosion caused by plasma.
LanguageData.Damage_WULA_Melta.label: Melta
LanguageData.Damage_WULA_Melta.deathMessage: {0} was melted by a melta weapon.
LanguageData.WULA_Shuttle_Autocannon_Bullet.label: Bullet
LanguageData.WULA_Disturber_Turret_Bomb.label: Lava Explosion
LanguageData.WULA_Combat_Excavator_Shoke_Damage.label: High-Energy Shockwave
LanguageData.WULA_Sow_Excavator_Shoke_Damage.label: High-Energy Shockwave
LanguageData.WULA_DarkMatterBomb.label: Dark Matter Annihilation Explosion
LanguageData.WULA_Mech_Drop.label: EMP
LanguageData.WULA_Mech_EMP_Drop.label: EMP
LanguageData.WULA_GiantBomb.label: Large Explosion
